title: The Love Mart
writer: Edward Childs Carpenter, Benjamin Glazer, Edwin Justus Mayer
actors: Billie Dove, Gilbert Roland, Ray Turner
plot: Victor, an adventurous young swashbuckler in 19th-century New Orleans, takes possession of a barber shop as the result of winning a duel, and decides to settle down to a life as a barber. He meets a beautiful young woman and pursu...
